title: At an Ice Cream Shop 冰激凌店
scene: Lily和Sister去冰激凌店买冰激凌。

lines.en: It is so hot today. Let us get some ice cream!
lines.zh: 今天好热。我们去买冰激凌吧！

lines.en: Yes! I love ice cream. Can I have two scoops?
lines.zh: 好！我喜欢冰激凌。我可以要两个球吗？

lines.en: One scoop is enough, I think.
They have chocolate, strawberry, vanilla, and mint.
lines.zh: 有巧克力、草莓、香草和薄荷味。

lines.en: I want strawberry and chocolate, please!
lines.zh: 我要草莓和巧克力味的！

lines.en: I will have vanilla in a cone.
Can I get sprinkles on top?
lines.zh: 我可以上面撒彩针糖吗？

lines.en: Sure. Here is some money for the ice cream.
lines.zh: 当然。这是买冰激凌的钱。

lines.en: Thank you, Lily! You are the best sister!
lines.zh: 谢谢你，莉莉！你是最棒的姐姐！
